steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the mosque “combines elements from the Persian, Mughal, and Moorish styles”—this decisive phrase shows multiple distinct architectural traditions being brought together.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Fusion” directly captures the blending of multiple distinct influences into a unified whole. The other choices all miss this combining sense. That matches choice A — A is correct.
